heading: Special assessment on convicted persons
label: 3013 Special assessment on convicted persons
notes: Amendments1996—Subsec. (a)(2). struck out “not less than” before “$100” in subpar. (A) and before “$400” in subpar. (B).Pub. L. 104–294substituted “not less than $100” for “$50” in subpar. (A) and “not less than $400” for “$200” in subpar. (B).Pub. L. 104–1321990—Subsec. (a)(1)(B). substituted “an infraction” for “a infraction” in cl. (i) and a semicolon for a period at end of cl. (iii).Pub. L. 101–6471988—Subsec. (a)(1). , amended par. (1) generally. Prior to amendment, par. (1) read as follows: “in the case of a misdemeanor—Pub. L. 100–690, § 7085“(A) the amount of $25 if the defendant is an individual; and“(B) the amount of $100 if the defendant is a person other than an individual; and”.Subsec. (c). , inserted at end “This subsection shall apply to all assessments irrespective of the date of imposition.”Pub. L. 100–690, § 7082(b)1987—Subsecs. (c), (d). added subsecs. (c) and (d).Pub. L. 100–185

children.label: i
children.text: the amount of $5 in the case of an infraction or a class C misdemeanor;

children.label: ii
children.text: the amount of $10 in the case of a class B misdemeanor; and

children.label: iii
children.text: the amount of $25 in the case of a class A misdemeanor; and

children.label: i
children.text: the amount of $25 in the case of an infraction or a class C misdemeanor;

children.label: ii
children.text: the amount of $50 in the case of a class B misdemeanor; and

children.label: iii
children.text: the amount of $125 in the case of a class A misdemeanor;

children.label: A
children.text: the amount of $100 if the defendant is an individual; and

children.label: B
children.text: the amount of $400 if the defendant is a person other than an individual.

children.label: b
children.text: Such amount so assessed shall be collected in the manner that fines are collected in criminal cases.

children.label: c
children.text: The obligation to pay an assessment ceases five years after the date of the judgment. This subsection shall apply to all assessments irrespective of the date of imposition.

children.label: d
children.text: For the purposes of this section, an offense under is an offense against the United States.section 13 of this title
